---
title: "About Me"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <div class="about-grid">

    <div class="about-photo-col">
      <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Mo Boroumand" class="about-photo"
           onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/260x260/1a237e/ffffff?text=MB'">
    </div>

    <div class="about-text-col">
      <h2>Hi, I'm Mo 👋</h2>

      <p>
        I'm a platform-focused product leader with 18+ years of experience building and scaling
        integration frameworks, data pipelines, API ecosystems, and shared services infrastructure.
        I co-founded Didehbannet ISP, where I built a proprietary CRM platform with multi-system
        API integrations, supported 50,000+ POS terminal connections, and delivered high-availability
        services at enterprise scale.
      </p>
      <p>
        I'm currently completing a Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at UC San Diego's
        Rady School of Management (Dec 2026), adding data science and analytics depth to my platform
        engineering background. I also run <strong>Mobosoft Inc.</strong>, a San Diego–based company
        delivering cloud infrastructure services and platform solutions.
      </p>
      <p>
        I'm passionate about turning complex technical challenges into clear product roadmaps — and
        I thrive at the intersection of engineering, data, and business strategy.
      </p>

      <h3>What I work with</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>🔗 Platform & API Integration — API lifecycle, shared services, interoperability</li>
        <li>📊 Data & Analytics — Python, SQL, GIS/Mapbox, Machine Learning, BI</li>
        <li>🧭 Product Management — Roadmaps, Agile/Scrum, cross-functional leadership</li>
        <li>☁️ Cloud Infrastructure — AWS/VPS, Linux/Ubuntu, high-availability systems</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Connect with me</h3>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/moboroumand" class="social-btn github">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/mohamad-boroumand" class="social-btn linkedin">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com" class="social-btn email">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> Email
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
